name: Stagwell Inc.
description: Stagwell Inc. is a global digital-first marketing and communications group founded in 2015 by Mark Penn. Headquartered in the United States, the company provides a comprehensive suite of services including digital transformation, media and commerce, marketing cloud solutions, and strategic communications. Stagwell operates as a network of agencies designed to drive results for ambitious B2C, B2B, and DTC brands worldwide. Following its merger with MDC Partners in 2021, the company has established itself as a significant player in the advertising and marketing industry, leveraging technology and data to deliver integrated marketing solutions on an international scale.
